subcodes.first_line: In this Dispensation the veil hath grown more impenetrable than in former times. During the Islamic Dispensation the veil had become such [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این دور حجاب محکمتر از سابق میباشد در دوره اسلام حجاب چنان شده بود
subcodes.subjects: @veiling [hijab], @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @critique of Western values; culture
